mapper.insert: INSERT INTO youtube_comment_analysis_top_keywords ( history_id, user_id, requested_at, params_json, result_json ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{userId}, #{requestedAt}, #{paramsJson}, #{resultJson} )
INSERT INTO youtube_comment_analysis_topic_groups ( history_id, user_id, requested_at, params_json, result_json ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{userId}, #{requestedAt}, #{paramsJson}, #{resultJson} )
INSERT INTO youtube_comment_analysis_sentiments ( history_id, user_id, requested_at, params_json, result_json ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{userId}, #{requestedAt}, #{paramsJson}, #{resultJson} )
INSERT INTO youtube_comment_analysis_word_networks ( history_id, user_id, requested_at, params_json, result_json ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{userId}, #{requestedAt}, #{paramsJson}, #{resultJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT result_json FROM youtube_comment_analysis_top_keywords WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY requested_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT result_json FROM youtube_comment_analysis_topic_groups WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY requested_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT result_json FROM youtube_comment_analysis_sentiments WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY requested_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT result_json FROM youtube_comment_analysis_word_networks WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY requested_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
